notes: Maximum run length of consecutive identical responses per respondent; the default cutoff is half the item count and is user-adjustable.
Intra-individual response variability (within-person SD across items); low values flag low-effort responding.
Even-odd consistency across within-scale item halves; reverse-keyed items are reverse-scored first.
Personal reliability (Jackson 1976) and its resampled variant (Goldammer et al. 2024, about 25 resamples); reverse-keyed items are reverse-scored first.
Psychometric synonyms: within-person correlation across strongly positively correlated item pairs; default critical r = 0.60.
Psychometric antonyms: within-person correlation across strongly negatively correlated item pairs; default critical r = -0.60.
Mahalanobis distance of each response vector from the sample centroid; chi-square cutoff at p = 0.001.
Person-total correlation (point-biserial form) of each respondent's responses with the whole-sample item means.
Normed polytomous Guttman-error index via PerFit Gnormed.poly; nonparametric, no IRT model; reverse-keyed items are reverse-scored first.
Polytomous person-scalability Ht via mokken coefH on the transposed scale; nonparametric; reverse-keyed items are reverse-scored first.
